<!-- fixture_expected: pass -->
<!-- fixture_purpose: commission-stage company board sealed pre-scan: COMMISSION_SEALED_PRE_SCAN with a not_checked coverage route and commissioned_not_yet_run scout status -->

# Company Competitive Intelligence Fixture: Example Labs

### 1. Company Commission And Identity Receipt

```yaml
company_commission_receipt:
  commission_id: fixture_company_example_labs
  mode: forward
  commission_profile: company_competitive_intelligence
  subject_count: 1
  subject_identity:
    raw_name: Example Labs
    subject_kind: brand_or_org_unresolved
    identity_state: unresolved
  as_of_date: "2026-07-16"
  time_posture: recency_first
  longitudinal_period: null
  longitudinal_rationale: not_applicable
  initial_proving_run: true
```

### 2. Decision-Neutral Boundary

This report records observable company and external-response evidence. It makes no GTM, demand, or intervention conclusion and keeps the Brand/Org identity unresolved.

### 3. Source-Family And Venue Coverage Ledger

```yaml
coverage_ledger:
  - coverage_id: COV-001
    source_family: owned_channels
    source_surface: company_site
    venue: Example Labs website
    relevance_rationale: Current first-party positioning and offering claims.
    route_or_query: https://example.test/company
    requirement: required
    status: checked
    yield: evidence_found
    recency: current
    access: accessible
    relevance: relevant
    gap_id: null
  - coverage_id: COV-002
    source_family: news_editorial_trade
    source_surface: trade_article
    venue: Example Trade
    relevance_rationale: Independent context for a stated operating move.
    route_or_query: https://example.test/trade/article
    requirement: required
    status: checked
    yield: evidence_found
    recency: current
    access: accessible
    relevance: relevant
    gap_id: null
  - coverage_id: COV-003
    source_family: forums_community
    source_surface: bounded_subreddit_scout
    venue: Reddit
    relevance_rationale: Mandatory bounded scout for customer and community response.
    route_or_query: site:reddit.com "Example Labs"
    requirement: mandatory_bounded_scout
    status: checked
    yield: zero_yield
    recency: unknown
    access: accessible
    relevance: relevant
    gap_id: null
  - coverage_id: COV-004
    source_family: forums_community
    source_surface: answer_forum_scout
    venue: Quora
    relevance_rationale: Explicit experimental scout for the initial proving run.
    route_or_query: site:quora.com "Example Labs"
    requirement: experimental_initial_proving_run
    status: not_checked
    yield: unknown
    recency: unknown
    access: accessible
    relevance: mixed
    gap_id: null
  - coverage_id: COV-005
    source_family: forums_community
    source_surface: category_specialist_forum
    venue: Example Specialist Forum
    relevance_rationale: Category-aware hidden-venue discovery surfaced a relevant specialist thread.
    route_or_query: https://example.test/forum/thread
    requirement: category_aware
    status: checked
    yield: evidence_found
    recency: current
    access: accessible
    relevance: relevant
    gap_id: null
  - coverage_id: COV-006
    source_family: retail_pdp
    source_surface: retailer_product_page
    venue: Example Retailer
    relevance_rationale: Current availability and channel corroboration.
    route_or_query: https://example.test/retailer/product
    requirement: required
    status: checked
    yield: evidence_found
    recency: current
    access: accessible
    relevance: relevant
    gap_id: null
  - coverage_id: COV-007
    source_family: professional_org_motion
    source_surface: public_filing
    venue: Example Registry
    relevance_rationale: Historical organization boundary and chronology.
    route_or_query: https://example.test/registry/filing
    requirement: required
    status: checked
    yield: evidence_found
    recency: historical
    access: accessible
    relevance: relevant
    gap_id: null
  - coverage_id: COV-008
    source_family: creator_social_video
    source_surface: public_video_comments
    venue: Example Video
    relevance_rationale: Relevant public response surface, but preservation access was blocked.
    route_or_query: https://example.test/video/item
    requirement: conditional
    status: blocked
    yield: blocked
    recency: unknown
    access: blocked
    relevance: relevant
    gap_id: GAP-001
```

### 4. Observation Ledger

```yaml
observation_ledger:
  - observation_id: OBS-001
    subject_name: Example Labs
    subject_kind: brand_or_org_unresolved
    identity_state: unresolved
    coverage_id: COV-001
    source_url_or_packet_locator: https://example.test/company
    source_family: owned_channels
    source_surface: company_site
    publisher_or_venue: Example Labs
    source_class: official_first_party
    publication_date: null
    event_or_effective_date: null
    observation_at: "2026-07-16T09:00:00Z"
    effective_time_precision: current_page_observation
    recency_tier: days_0_30
    age_anchor_date: "2026-07-16"
    age_anchor_basis: current_page_observation
    exact_locator: page heading Current products
    evidence_excerpt: Example Labs presents Product One as its current flagship.
    lawful_access_route: public_direct_read
    access_limitation: current page only; no historical snapshot claimed
    independence_syndication_group: example_labs_owned_001
    independent_corroboration_ids: []
    ambiguity_limitation: Brand/Org identity remains unresolved.
    contradiction_state: none_observed
    fact_domain: company_fact
    current_state_use: primary_current
    consumed_by_sections: [5, 6, 9]
  - observation_id: OBS-002
    subject_name: Example Labs
    subject_kind: brand_or_org_unresolved
    identity_state: unresolved
    coverage_id: COV-002
    source_url_or_packet_locator: https://example.test/trade/article
    source_family: news_editorial_trade
    source_surface: trade_article
    publisher_or_venue: Example Trade
    source_class: independent
    publication_date: "2026-06-01"
    event_or_effective_date: "2026-06-01"
    observation_at: "2026-07-16T09:10:00Z"
    effective_time_precision: day
    recency_tier: days_31_90
    age_anchor_date: "2026-06-01"
    age_anchor_basis: event_effective
    exact_locator: paragraph 4
    evidence_excerpt: The article reports a distribution expansion announced by Example Labs.
    lawful_access_route: public_direct_read
    access_limitation: article repeats announcement language
    independence_syndication_group: distribution_announcement_001
    independent_corroboration_ids: []
    ambiguity_limitation: Independent publication, but the claim traces to the company announcement.
    contradiction_state: syndication_risk_visible
    fact_domain: company_fact
    current_state_use: current_corroboration
    consumed_by_sections: [5, 6, 8]
  - observation_id: OBS-003
    subject_name: Example Labs
    subject_kind: brand_or_org_unresolved
    identity_state: unresolved
    coverage_id: COV-006
    source_url_or_packet_locator: https://example.test/retailer/product
    source_family: retail_pdp
    source_surface: retailer_product_page
    publisher_or_venue: Example Retailer
    source_class: retailer
    publication_date: "2026-06-02"
    event_or_effective_date: null
    observation_at: "2026-07-16T09:20:00Z"
    effective_time_precision: current_page_observation
    recency_tier: days_31_90
    age_anchor_date: "2026-06-02"
    age_anchor_basis: publication
    exact_locator: product title and availability block
    evidence_excerpt: The retailer lists Product One as available in the US channel.
    lawful_access_route: public_direct_read
    access_limitation: availability is an observed page state, not a dated launch event
    independence_syndication_group: distribution_announcement_001
    independent_corroboration_ids: []
    ambiguity_limitation: Listing does not establish inventory depth or sales.
    contradiction_state: none_observed
    fact_domain: company_fact
    current_state_use: current_corroboration
    consumed_by_sections: [5, 6, 8]
  - observation_id: OBS-004
    subject_name: Example Labs
    subject_kind: brand_or_org_unresolved
    identity_state: unresolved
    coverage_id: COV-005
    source_url_or_packet_locator: https://example.test/forum/thread
    source_family: forums_community
    source_surface: category_specialist_forum
    publisher_or_venue: Example Specialist Forum
    source_class: customer_community
    publication_date: "2026-07-10"
    event_or_effective_date: null
    observation_at: "2026-07-16T09:30:00Z"
    effective_time_precision: day
    recency_tier: days_0_30
    age_anchor_date: "2026-07-10"
    age_anchor_basis: publication
    exact_locator: thread 42, post 3
    evidence_excerpt: One participant describes Product One packaging as difficult to use.
    lawful_access_route: public_direct_read
    access_limitation: single attributable experience; not representative
    independence_syndication_group: forum_thread_042_post_003
    independent_corroboration_ids: []
    ambiguity_limitation: Individual experience with unknown sampling context.
    contradiction_state: external_response_only
    fact_domain: external_customer_evidence
    current_state_use: supporting_or_recurrence
    consumed_by_sections: [7, 8, 9]
  - observation_id: OBS-005
    subject_name: Example Labs
    subject_kind: brand_or_org_unresolved
    identity_state: unresolved
    coverage_id: COV-007
    source_url_or_packet_locator: https://example.test/registry/filing
    source_family: professional_org_motion
    source_surface: public_filing
    publisher_or_venue: Example Registry
    source_class: official_regulatory
    publication_date: "2025-12-01"
    event_or_effective_date: "2025-11-30"
    observation_at: "2026-07-16T09:40:00Z"
    effective_time_precision: day
    recency_tier: days_over_180
    age_anchor_date: "2025-11-30"
    age_anchor_basis: event_effective
    exact_locator: filing section Organization
    evidence_excerpt: The filing names Example Labs LLC as an operating organization.
    lawful_access_route: public_direct_read
    access_limitation: historical filing; does not resolve the current Brand/Org relationship
    independence_syndication_group: registry_filing_2025_001
    independent_corroboration_ids: []
    ambiguity_limitation: Historical legal name does not establish current market-facing Brand identity.
    contradiction_state: identity_boundary_open
    fact_domain: company_fact
    current_state_use: chronology_historical_baseline
    consumed_by_sections: [6, 8, 9]
```

### 5. Portfolio And Retail Architecture

Commission-stage evidence exposes a provisional owned anchor and one retailer
surface; acquisition remains open (OBS-001, OBS-003).

#### Owned Portfolio Denominator

| Category / franchise | Current parent products | Material variants | Bundles / sets | Coverage state | Gap IDs | Observation IDs |
| --- | ---: | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Core line | 1 | not exposed | none observed | provisional | none | OBS-001 |

#### Product, Claim, And Price Architecture

| Product / franchise | Format and use case | Price tier | Claims / proof posture | Ingredient or formula family | Relationship | Observation IDs |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Product One | current flagship offer | unknown | first-party flagship language | not captured | visible anchor | OBS-001 |

#### Qualified Retailer Corpus

| Retailer | Qualification and typed outcome | Grid denominator | Reconciled exact listings | PDP baseline coverage | Distinct retailer facts | Gap IDs | Observation IDs |
| --- | --- | ---: | ---: | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Example Retailer | qualified; observed listing | unknown | 1 | bounded page | US presence | none | OBS-003 |

#### Evidence-Selected Product Depth

| Product | Named evidence job | Selection evidence | Deep surfaces | Corpus boundary / overlap state | Limitations | Observation IDs |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Product One | visible anchor | first-party prominence | owned and retailer pages | no review corpus | no rate inference | OBS-001, OBS-003 |

#### Outside-In Portfolio Interpretation

| Product / franchise | Visible role | Decisive observed pattern | Evidence boundary | Confidence | Invalidation condition | Observation IDs |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Product One | flagship anchor | owned prominence plus retailer presence | not sales leadership | low | a complete census exposes another anchor | OBS-001, OBS-003 |

#### Strategic Positioning, Markets, And Channels

| Arena | Visible company move | Evidence | Strongest bounded interpretation | Gap / contradiction | Observation IDs |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| US retail | retailer presence | current retailer page | visible US channel pursuit | assortment depth unknown | OBS-003 |

### 6. Strategic And Operating Chronology

A trade article and retailer page point to a recent distribution expansion, but both share a syndication group and therefore do not count as independent corroboration (OBS-002, OBS-003). The older filing is historical identity context only (OBS-005).

### 7. Customer And Community Response

The Reddit scout yielded no attributable material. One specialist-forum participant reported packaging friction; this remains an individual external experience, not representative demand or internal company fact (OBS-004).

### 8. Competitor Context, Contradictions, And Gaps

Comparator context is limited to interpreting the subject; no deep competitor treatment was commissioned. The open Brand/Org boundary and syndication risk remain visible (OBS-002, OBS-005), and the blocked video surface remains a typed gap rather than evidence.

### 9. Company Surface Candidate Ledger

```yaml
company_surface_candidate_ledger:
  - candidate_id: CSC-001
    observation_ids: [OBS-001]
    candidate_only: true
    import_status: not_imported
    candidate_fact_class: company_fact
    bounded_fact: The observed current company page presents Product One as a current flagship.
    identity_state: unresolved
    time_scope: observed_current_page_at_2026-07-16
    limitations: No Company Surface import or identity resolution occurred.
  - candidate_id: CSC-002
    observation_ids: [OBS-004]
    candidate_only: true
    import_status: not_imported
    candidate_fact_class: external_customer_evidence
    bounded_fact: One attributable specialist-forum participant reported packaging friction.
    identity_state: unresolved
    time_scope: published_2026-07-10
    limitations: Individual external experience; not representative demand or internal company fact.
```

### 10. Completion Ledger And Run Boundary

```yaml
completion_ledger:
  coverage_status: complete_with_typed_gap
  observation_status: traceable
  candidate_status: candidate_only_not_imported
  completeness_policy: necessary_complete_no_arbitrary_caps
  hidden_venue_discovery: category_aware
  reddit_scout_status: checked_zero_yield
  quora_scout_status: commissioned_not_yet_run
  customer_community_boundary: external_evidence_not_representative_demand_or_internal_fact
  deep_competitor_treatment: separate_named_follow_up_required
  classifier_handoff: omitted
  required_lens_coverage:
    portfolio_and_retail_architecture: {status: complete, observation_ids: [OBS-001, OBS-003], rationale: provisional owned and retailer architecture is visible}
    positioning: {status: complete, observation_ids: [OBS-001], rationale: current first-party statement}
    offerings_and_claims: {status: complete, observation_ids: [OBS-001], rationale: bounded current offering claim}
    markets_and_channels: {status: complete, observation_ids: [OBS-003], rationale: retailer channel observation}
    strategic_and_operating_moves: {status: complete, observation_ids: [OBS-002, OBS-003], rationale: recent distribution pointer with syndication caveat}
    customer_and_community_response: {status: complete, observation_ids: [OBS-004], rationale: zero-yield Reddit scout plus one specialist-forum experience}
    competitor_and_substitute_context: {status: not_applicable_with_rationale, observation_ids: [], rationale: no comparator was needed to interpret the subject}
    contradictions: {status: complete, observation_ids: [OBS-002, OBS-005], rationale: syndication and identity-boundary limitations are explicit}
    evidence_gaps: {status: complete, observation_ids: [], rationale: blocked creator surface and unresolved identity are typed below}
  gaps:
    - gap_id: GAP-001
      gap_type: capture_required
      status: open
      description: Public video comments could not be preserved through the observed route.
      affected_coverage_ids: [COV-008]
      request_ids: [REQ-001]
    - gap_id: GAP-002
      gap_type: identity
      status: open
      description: Brand and Org identity remain unresolved.
      affected_coverage_ids: [COV-001, COV-007]
      request_ids: []
  requests:
    - request_id: REQ-001
      request_type: capture_preservation
      owner: capture
      status: requested
      description: Inspect lawful preservation options for the exact public video item.
      source_surface: public_video_comments
  run_boundary: COMMISSION_SEALED_PRE_SCAN
  next_authorized_step: A separately commissioned Scanning or Capture run may address the typed request; no import or classifier handoff occurred.
```
